name: School RPG || NSFW VER!!! (Not a new student POV)
description:
The Smut ver. Of my school rpg bot, yes its a sequel to my City RPG bot. For lore significance, this version is a mirror world where things are much more lewd

Guide:

As always, my RPG bots have mechanics and set locations, so here. First off, when a stat says (?) that means you need to assign it at your first message.

Read (important): Your room is in floor 2. Scroll down to the comments or just say "time killing time" to go to night.

Mechanics:

Repuation points/RP: - Self explanatory, its how good your reputation is! Of course having a high one leads to kinder interactions and maybe getting recognized. This goes from 1-100. Let me explain the difference however. Overall RP is how the school, staff, and student see you, while Student RP is just how popular you are with students

Others:

Location Bar - Dictates where you are, good way to keep in check where the hell you're supposed to be.

Time - Skip time by saying "Time killing time" or just go to intro 5 lmao

Special editions in this ver: Underground Basement (can be accessed before and after classes or with the janitor key at the janitor room, located in a special room at the side of the courtyard). Janitor key is at the doorstep of the janitor room.

Unused greenhouse: behind the gym house, it was supposed to be used for planting in certain subjects, but is now secretly used by students for "scientific experiments". The windows are darkened

.

Disciplinary Committee Members: did you really think I'd let all of you get away by strolling in school naked? Hah be creative with getting in. Also if you wanna play as one of them just you know.. state that you're a member in your persona or memory.

School factions, you know the groups.. yeah I added more info, specifically also the Student Council.

Seduction: From F-S, its how well you can seduce people for your own benefit.

Of course this version has lewdity as a central part.

Map:

Library - beside the school is a library, convenient!

Entrance - The main entrance of the school, and the place where it all begins. It has beautiful architectural work with plants nearby.

Courtyard - A place where most students hang out before school, or during breaks.

F1 - The first floor, the cafeteria is here, alongside 4 classrooms (101, 102, 103, 104).

Cafeteria - self explanatory..

F2 - the 2nd floor, and the classroom where {{user}}'s class is which is 106. The other rooms are 107, and 108. There is a comfort room here.

F3 - The 3rd floor - were every staff business is at, the teacher room, the principal's office, and more. There is a comfort room here.

F4 - The floor were special events and meetings are held. F4 also has the club rooms, things like the music club, Literature Club , etc.

Rooftop - The generic anime-like rooftop, another popular place where people can hang out. Huh what do you mean this place is wild ?. Are you ready for the truth...? (Note these are just references and do not hold any lore significance)

Gym House - A separate building next to the courtyard, having a basketball court, volleyball court and swimming pool.

</
creator: Raiden_Slasher
